zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Clinton於大約1206年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，他的父親Osbert de Clinton28歲，母親Elisant d' Amington24歲。他於大約1230年與Mazera de Bisege在英國萊希斯特斯爾武洛斯索普結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1278年1月12日在英國瓦維其可爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Clinton于大约1206年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，他的父亲Osbert de Clinton28岁，母亲Elisant d' Amington24岁。他于大约1230年与Mazera de Bisege在英国萊希斯特斯爾武洛斯索普结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。他去世于1278年1月12日在英国瓦維其可爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Clinton was born about 1206, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Osbert de Clinton, was 28 and his mother, Elisant d' Amington, was 24. He married Mazera de Bisege about 1230, in Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died on 12 January 1278, in Warwickshire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Clinton est né environ 1206, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Osbert de Clinton, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elisant d' Amington, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Mazera de Bisege environ 1230, à Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé le 12 janvier 1278, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Clinton um 1206 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbert de Clinton 28 und seine Mutter Elisant d' Amington 24. Er hat um 1230 in Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, England Mazera de Bisege geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb am 12. Januar 1278 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clinton è nato il circa 1206 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Osbert de Clinton, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elisant d' Amington, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Mazera de Bisege circa 1230, nel Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì il 12 gennaio 1278, nel Warwickshire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Clintonが約1206年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Osbert de Clintonは28歳，母Elisant d' Amingtonは24歳であった。約1230年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアウレスソルペでMazera de Bisegeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1278年1月12日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Clinton(이)가 대략 1206년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbert de Clinton(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisant d' Amington(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1230년 영국 레이스스터실르 울레스소에서 Mazera de Bisege(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1278년 1월 12일 영국 워윅실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clinton nasceu aproximadamente 1206, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Osbert de Clinton, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elisant d' Amington, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Mazera de Bisege aproximadamente 1230, em Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu em 12 de janeiro de 1278, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Clinton родился около 1206 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Osbert de Clinton было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisant d' Amington, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Mazera de Bisege около 1230 г. в местности уллестаурп, лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер 12 января 1278 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Clinton nació aproximadamente 1206, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Osbert de Clinton, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elisant d' Amington, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Mazera de Bisege aproximadamente 1230, en Ullesthorpe, Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió el 12 de enero de 1278, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
